narrative:
Precinct Shalersville C (precinct in Portage County) has 751 registered voters, with 65.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
